description.unified: Attacks a random enemy 5 times to deal a total of ??? M.DMG and stunning the target for [0.5 sec->1 sec] each hit. Deals ??? additional M.DMG per Ember stack to Non-Hero enemies. Upon a Crit Hit, recovers own Mana by 100.

Attacks the target and the enemies in nearby range, dealing ??? M.DMG and stunning them for [1 sec->2 sec]. Deals ??? + ??? additional M.DMG per Ember stack to Non-Hero enemies. [(added) Inflicts 12 Ember stacks on hit targets.]
Attacks all enemies 5 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG. This attack deals [160%->150%] increased Crit DMG. Deals ??? additional M.DMG per Ember stack to Non-Hero enemies.

Inflicts a stack of Ember upon hitting an enemy. Enemies affected by Ember take ??? M.DMG over 20 sec. Ember can be stacked up to max [10->12] times and upon hitting an enemy with max number of stacks, recovers Mana by 30.

dark.unified: Changes target to the enemy with the highest ATK.

light.unified: Upon hitting an enemy with 10 or more stacks of Ember, increases M.DMG it takes by [20%->40%] for [5 seconds->10 seconds].

dark.unified: Reduces Mana Cost by [2000->2] for 10 sec when attacking more than 5 enemies. 10 sec Cooldown is applied.

light.unified: Reduces the target's M.DEF by 2.5% per [Ember] stack.

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, enemies affected by Ember are stunned for [1 sec->2 sec]. Enemies with more than 10 stacks of Ember are stunned for [1.5 sec->3 sec].

description.unified: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by.

[Fire Rain] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by 5%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 20%.

dark.unified: If a target has 10 stacks of Ember, increases the M.DMG the target takes by 30%, and adds [1 stack->2 stacks] of Ember per second to all non-hero enemies.

description.unified: Increases ATK Spd by {0}. Skill hits deal additional M.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK per stack of Ember inflicted on enemies.
